mapper.sql: id, community_id, house_no, authorization_id, car_number, session_start, last_entry_time, accumulated_duration, status, timeout_notified, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_session SET accumulated_duration = #{accumulatedDuration}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visitor_session WHERE accumulated_duration >= 1440 AND status = 'in_park' AND (timeout_notified IS NULL OR timeout_notified = 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visitor_session (community_id, house_no, authorization_id, car_number, session_start, last_entry_time, accumulated_duration, status, timeout_notified, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{communityId}, #{houseNo}, #{authorizationId}, #{carNumber}, #{sessionStart}, #{lastEntryTime}, #{accumulatedDuration}, #{status}, #{timeoutNotified}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_session SET status = #{status}, last_entry_time = #{lastEntryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visitor_session WHERE authorization_id = #{authorizationId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM visitor_session WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND car_number = #{carNumber} AND status = 'in_park' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM visitor_session WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND car_number = #{carNumber} AND status = 'out_of_park' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE visitor_session SET timeout_notified = #{timeoutNotified}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
